title: 6 Dividend Stocks That Can Afford to Pay Their High Yields
text: These are 6 dividend stocks that can afford to pay their high yields. The dividend payout ratios are less than 50% for these stocks.

title: 6 High-Yield Stocks With Good Upside Potential
text: These six high-yield stocks have good upside potential based on a 5% minimum yield, growing earnings, and a 35% to 45% coverage ratio. The post 6 High-Yield Stocks With Good Upside Potential appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 7 High-Yield Dividend Stocks for All the Income Lovers
text: With the market becoming increasingly unfriendly toward growth-oriented names, it's time to focus on high-yield dividend stocks to buy. The post 7 High-Yield Dividend Stocks for All the Income Lovers appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: LyondellBasell: A Potential Opportunity for Defensive Investors
text: Research has found companies that operate closer to the beginning of the production chain are better suited to survive in periods of inflation because they produce essential products or materials used by other businesses and production chains, or they have more options to pass the higher costs on to consumers. Whatever the reason, such companies are believed to absorb and suffer from the shock to a lesser degree because they pass it on to other companies.

title: 6 Stocks That Will Be First to Rebound From the Coming Recession
text: These six stocks have high-quality earnings, brand names, and revenue growth. Their stocks will be the first to rebound after a recession is seen as nearing its end.

title: 6 Dividend Stocks Poised to Push Higher
text: These 6 fast-growing dividend stocks have yields mostly over 4%, low P/E multiples and good earnings growth. The post 6 Dividend Stocks Poised to Push Higher appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 3 Undervalued Stocks With Market-Beating Dividends
text: The more than 13% decline in the S&P 500 Index since the start of the year has meant that many names have experienced falling share prices. This has resulted in a resizing of valuations in a lot of cases.

title: 6 Bargain Dividend Stocks to Buy Paying 3%+ Dividend Yields
text: These six bargain dividend stocks are worth buying as their 3.0%+ dividend yields provide a steady income for investors. The post 6 Bargain Dividend Stocks to Buy Paying 3%+ Dividend Yields appeared first on InvestorPlace.
